name: AnnouncementNotification
description: AnnouncementNotification schema from SASE Multitenant Notifications

notificationId.description: Unique identifier for this notification delivery.

body.description: Full announcement body with details about the platform change, maintenance window, or service update.

affectedServices.description: List of SASE services affected by the announcement, such as Prisma Access, GlobalProtect, ADEM, SWG, or ZTNA.

effectiveDate.description: Date and time when the announced change takes effect.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the announcement was published.

tsg_id.description: Tenant Service Group identifier if the announcement is tenant-specific. Omitted for global announcements.
